title: Photorealistic Astronaut Cat Edit
sourceTitle: Preserve As Much My Image As Possible
prompt:
Preserve as much of my image as
possible and make it photorealistic
originalPrompt:
Preserve as much of my image as
possible and make it photorealistic

promptTranslations.zh: 尽可能多地保留我的图像，并使其呈现出照片级真实感
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Preserve as much of my image as
possible and make it photorealistic
promptTranslations.ru:
Сохраните как можно больше моего изображения
и сделайте его фотореалистичным
promptTranslations.pt: Preserve o máximo possível da minha imagem e faça com que fique fotorrealista
promptTranslations.ja: できるだけ元の画像を保持し、フォトリアリスティックに仕上げてください
promptTranslations.ko:
내 이미지를 가능한 한 많이 보존하고
포토리얼리스틱하게 만들어 주세요
